demographics.occupation: salaried professional; also does a large amount of unpaid internal committee and mentoring work at their organisation

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am doing the work of three people just to prove I deserve to be in the room, and now I physically cannot get out of bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last two days I've completely crashed — I can't stay awake more than a couple of hours, my whole body is wiped out and I can't function at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: building gradually over about six months, then a sharp physical crash in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of getting worse; the severe crash is 2 days old
symptom_narrative.character: bone-deep exhaustion, can't stay awake for more than about two hours, foggy and slow to think and speak
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I physically can't get out of bed
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, dramatically worse over the last two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; even sleeping doesn't fix it and coffee only lifts it for a short while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: logging on to work and the constant stream of messages and requests
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been catching every cold going around lately, I'm barely sleeping despite being exhausted, and my heart sometimes feels like it's racing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt run down and stretched before but I have never physically collapsed like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound; unable to work or do normal daily tasks

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: caffeine — 6 or more cups of coffee a day to force myself to stay awake

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Carries a heavy load of unpaid committee and mentoring work on top of a full main job, and feels it goes unrecognised and even professionally penalised. Feels constantly expected to represent and speak for a whole community, and is emotionally drained from supporting colleagues through workplace upheavals. A work laptop is open on the bed and keeps pinging with messages.
